query.error_message: mat1 and mat2 shapes cannot be multiplied
query.traceback_summary: RuntimeError from matrix multiplication with incompatible tensor dimensions.
query.root_cause_hypothesis: The downstream layer input dimension does not match upstream tensor features.
query.repair_action: Inspect tensor dimensions and align the downstream layer input dimension.

record.error_message: mat1 and mat2 shapes cannot be multiplied
record.traceback_summary: mat1 and mat2 shapes cannot be multiplied
record.root_cause_hypothesis: The tensor feature dimension used in matrix multiplication is inconsistent with the expected input dimension of the downstream layer.
record.repair_action: Inspect the tensor shape before the failing matrix multiplication and align the downstream layer input dimension with the actual upstream feature dimension.

metadata.task_name: Diagnose tensor shape mismatch in a minimal PyTorch training script

record.error_message: mat1 and mat2 must have the same dtype
record.traceback_summary: mat1 and mat2 must have the same dtype
record.root_cause_hypothesis: The failing operation received tensors with incompatible dtypes, causing the operator to reject the computation.
record.repair_action: Inspect the dtype of the tensors involved in the failing operation and convert them to compatible dtypes before the computation.
record.patch_plan_summary: Convert float64 tensor construction to float32.

metadata.task_name: Diagnose dtype mismatch in a minimal PyTorch script

record.error_message: Expected all tensors to be on the same device
record.traceback_summary: Expected all tensors to be on the same device
record.root_cause_hypothesis: Some tensors or model parameters are located on different devices, such as CPU and CUDA, during the same computation.
record.repair_action: Inspect model and tensor device placement, then move all operands involved in the failing computation to the same target device.
record.patch_plan_summary: Align input tensor device with model device.

metadata.task_name: Repair device mismatch in a minimal tensor workflow
